description_long: This handbag features a structured, trapezoidal body with a tan faux-leather exterior and a prominent woven fabric panel on the front and back, displaying a bold geometric pattern in black and cream. The bag is equipped with two sturdy, rounded handles for hand carrying, as well as a long, adjustable crossbody strap attached with metal hardware for versatile wear. The top of the bag appears to have a zipper closure, ensuring the contents are secure. The woven panel is the main decorative element, giving the bag a distinctive, artisanal look. The base and sides are reinforced with the same tan material, providing durability and shape retention. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A tan handbag with a geometric black-and-cream woven panel, dual handles, and a long adjustable strap, featuring a secure top zipper closure and a structured silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the geometric woven panel, dual handles, and the full length of the crossbody strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, the attachment of the strap, and the bag's structured profile.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front with the same woven pattern, handles, and strap attachment points visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's depth and the way the strap falls, with less visibility of the woven panel.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular brand plaque is visible on the upper front center, featuring metallic or embossed text.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded handles for hand carrying and one long, adjustable crossbody strap attached with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure located at the top opening of the bag, running the full width.
attribute_decorative_elements: Woven geometric fabric panel on front and back; small brand plaque on the front.
attribute_pattern: Geometric black-and-cream woven pattern on the main panel; rest of the bag is solid tan.
